title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Novartis India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Novartis India
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
